commands.repair_reason: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof before normal maintainer review or merge; there is no narrow automated repair to make on the branch.; Cleared: The diff only changes Codex app-server timeout control flow and a colocated test; it does not touch dependencies, CI, secrets, permissions, downloads, or publishing paths. commands.review_summary:
The PR re-arms the Codex app-server short completion idle watchdog after the final non-assistant current-turn item completes and adds a regression test for that stall.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: the current-main branch disarms the short completion watchdog after the reduced final `item/completed` sequence, so it waits for the longer terminal guard. I did not execute the test because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof before normal maintainer review or merge; there is no narrow automated repair to make on the branch.
